items.content_html: This week’s meetup with be bouldering centric as we go check out the fresh problems at @vanhoevenberg’s Hi-Notch gym after their competition last weekend. Didn’t send everything on Saturday, or want to show off your best moves? Join us Wednesday, April 8th from 5:45 to 8pm and get it done! It’s just $7 for an after-hours pass.

items.content_html:
Come pull on some plastic with us (and get ready for @vanhoevenberg’s boulder comp this weekend) at @metrorockvermont on Wednesday, April 1 at 5:45pm. No foolin’!

Day pass is $26 ($22 for students). Link for more info in bio.

Look for the guy in the bright yellow pants and black t-shirt (@heyjb.me).

items.content_html:
If there’s ice to climb, we’re climbing it! Tomorrow’s meetup will be at the Positive Reinforcement area in the Chapel Pond Canyon at 5:45pm. Easiest approach is via the Beer Walls (head down from Upper on the trail to Lower, and then continue all the way to the bottom of the canyon, then turn right and continue down the canyon till you come to the first large, obvious flow). More info at link in bio.

Need gear? DM @onwardguides ASAP to reserve it!
items.content_text: If there’s ice to climb, we’re climbing it! Tomorrow’s meetup will be at the Positive Reinforcement area in the Chapel Pond Canyon at 5:45pm. Easiest approach is via the Beer Walls (head down from Upper on the trail to Lower, and then continue all the way to the bottom of the canyon, then turn right and continue down the canyon till you come to the first large, obvious flow). More info at link in bio. Need gear? DM @onwardguides ASAP to reserve it!

items.content_html:
We’re back at it for as long as the ice lasts! This week’s meetup will be at the Harlot flow in the NSOP area. Park at the end of Mountain Lane in Lake Placid and then follow the Jackrabbit Trail for about 10 minutes until just past the first big clearing. Take an immediate left off the path once you reach the huge rock alongside the trail. More info at the link in our bio.

Gear provided to those in need by @onwardguides. Just DM them ASAP to reserve it.

📸: @bonacio_th

Just DM them ASAP to reserve it. 📸: @bonacio_th

items.content_html:
With the rain and warm weather, we’re taking refuge inside this week! Join us at @rocksportny climbing gym at 5:45pm to pull on some plastic. Gotta get strong for rock season somehow!

Entry fee is $22 ($20 for students). More info at the link in our bio. See you there!

items.content_html:
Our meetup on Wednesday, March 4 will be at the Buster/Bowser/Boozer areas to the right of the Sisters climbs in Cascade Pass! Come at 5:45pm for some fun, approachable climbs. Parking info at link in bio.

Need to borrow gear? DM @onwardguides to borrow boots, crampons, tools and more for free!

items.content_html: Tonight’s meetup will be held at @vanhoevenberg’s Hi-Notch gym, graciously hosted by @bbrianandersonn! Get pumped on plastic while the snow squalls outside. An after-hours climbing pass costs $7 at the door.

items.content_html:
Sorry for the late post, but we WILL be climbing the frozen waters again this week! Tomorrow’s meetup will be at Chiller Pillar in Wilmington. Park at the Cobble Hill Lookout trailhead, and walk two minutes up the trail to the old quarry. Link in bio. See you there!

Equipment rentals provided free of charge by @onwardguides to those in need! DM them ahead of time to reserve your boots.

items.content_html:
Our meetup for Wednesday, Feb. 11 will be at the Pitchoff Quarry. Ice has been great lately, so get psyched for steep and long climbs! Meet at the pulloff (link in bio) at 5:45p if you’re not familiar with where to go. If anyone can get there early to start rigging ropes, that would be awesome!

Need to borrow gear? Message @onwardguides, who supports the club with free rentals, to reserve boots, crampons, helmet, and/or harness. Limited sizes available, so DM them early!

items.content_html:
For our Wednesday, Feb 4 ice climber meetup, we’re heading back to the classic Pitchoff Right for some fat conditions! Meet at the parking spot at 5:45pm and we’ll head up to set some ropes together.

Need gear? @onwardguides makes some available for FREE. Just DM them early to reserve boots.

Link to parking and more info in bio. See you tomorrow!

items.content_html:
For our Jan 28th meetup, we’re getting strong in the gym! 💪 Meet at 5:45pm at @vanhoevenberg’s Hi-Notch Climbing Gym for bouldering, top rope, and lead climbing. Don’t forget $7 for your after-hours pass. Thanks to @keepontrekkingg for hosting this week’s meetup!

Link for more info and online payment in our bio.

Don't forget $7 for your after-hours pass. Thanks to @keepontrekkingg for hosting this week's meetup! Link for more info and online payment in our bio.

items.content_html:
For our Jan 21 ice climber meetup, we’re heading east to Plattsburgh and the steep walls of Poke-O-Moonshine. We’ll meet in the old campground parking lot at 5:45pm and then walk up to the Waterfall and set up top ropes there! Driving directions and more info at the link in our bio. Don’t forget your headlamp, and consider setting up carpools via our WhatsApp community chat.

All are welcome! Got gear and a rope? Great! No gear? No problem! With support from @onwardguides, we have free gear rentals (boots, crampons, tools, harness, helmet) for those in need. Just send them a DM early.

Don't forget your headlamp, and consider setting up carpools via our WhatsApp community chat. All are welcome! Got gear and a rope? Great! No gear? No problem! With support from @onwardguides, we have free gear rentals (boots, crampons, tools, harness, helmet) for those in need. Just send them a DM early.

items.content_html:
For this Wednesday, Jan 14 ice climber meetup, we’re heading back to the old stalwart, Pitchoff Quarry. (Poke-O was looking a little rotten, maybe next week!) The Quarry has room for a bunch of ropes, and is a great spot for hard top roping. Free gear rental available from @onwardguides with a DM. Hope to see you there!

Parking/approach directions at link in bio.

If the ice there is bad, Plan B is Pitchoff Right/Left from the same parking area.

The Quarry has room for a bunch of ropes, and is a great spot for hard top roping. Free gear rental available from @onwardguides with a DM. Hope to see you there! items.content_html:
Happy 2026! We’re kicking the new year off with an ice climbing meetup at Whales area of Chapel Pond Canyon this Wednesday, Jan. 7 at 5:45p — bring your headlamp! We’ll get a few ropes up on that and nearby climbs. Free gear rental via @onwardguides (DM them early!) and access info at the Mountain Project link in bio.

All are welcome, but we don’t recommend pulling into the Chapel Pond campsites parking unless you have all/4-wheel drive. Alternative access from the Chapel Pond parking lot by walking across Chapel Pond (at your own risk). It’s the first climbing area you come to once entering the canyon.
items.content_text: Happy 2026! We're kicking the new year off with an ice climbing meetup at Whales area of Chapel Pond Canyon this Wednesday, Jan. 7 at 5:45p — bring your headlamp! All are welcome, but we don't recommend pulling into the Chapel Pond campsites parking unless you have all/4-wheel drive. Alternative access from the Chapel Pond parking lot by walking across Chapel Pond (at your own risk). It's the first climbing area you come to once entering the canyon.

items.content_html: See you all in 2026! Thanks for a wonderful year of climbing and community!
items.content_text: See you all in 2026! Thanks for a wonderful year of climbing and community!

items.content_html: 🎄 Happy Holidays! No official meet up this week (or next), but our community chat is always open if anyone wants to partner up! Link in bio. Take care, everyone!

items.content_html:
Two choices for this week’s meetup! Climb ice at Chiller Pillar in Wilmington (Cobble Lookout trailhead, link in bio) or indoors at @vanhoevenberg’s Hi-Notch Gym! We’ll have club members in both spots at 5:45pm. Might be our last official meet up of 2025 with holidays falling the next couple of Wednesdays. Hope to see you there!

NOTE that there will NOT be equipment rentals available this week, although folks have offered to share tools.

items.content_html:
Tomorrow, we take on the steep walls of Pitchoff Quarry! Meet up with fellow ice climbers at 5:45 at the Pitchoff Right pulloff and we’ll walk over together if you don’t know the way. If you’re late, head down Cascade Pass (left if you’re looking at the lakes) about a 1/4 mile until you see our footprints heading up and over a small hill into the quarry. Info/directions at our link in bio. Don’t forget your headlamp!

Need gear? @onwardguides provides free rentals for the club. Sizes for boots are limited, so message them ASAP to reserve a pair. Crampons, axes, harness, and helmet also available.

Crampons, axes, harness, and helmet also available.

items.content_html:
It’s time! Ice season is back and we’re doing our first ice climber meetup at 5:45p on Wednesday, Dec 3 at Pitchoff Right. Things are looking good for some decent coverage. Cascade Pass is notoriously windy, so make sure to dress warmly! And a headlamp is a must.

Pitchoff Right offers moderate routes, great for learning or dialing in technique in the early season before getting into steeper routes, so don’t feel intimidated. Want to give it a try but don’t have boots, crampons, or ice tools? Our friends at @onwardguides support the club by offering free rentals — harness and helmet too. Sizes are limited, so please reach out to them ahead of time to reserve your boots.

Link to directions in bio.

Back at @vanhoevenberg for our club meetup this week, with 🤞 for our first ice meetup of the season next week!

See you at 5:45pm, don’t forget $7 for the after hours pass. 🙂 Happy Thanksgiving, everyone!

This week’s meetup will be at @vanhoevenberg’s Hi-Notch Gym. We’ll get to try out all the new problems from their boulder comp last weekend! Don’t forget your $7 for the after-hours pass. See you at 5:45pm!

Ice is coming in! Hope to be back outside soon!

items.content_html: So much fun at Paul Smith’s gym! Great turnout, great games, great times. We’ll be back!

items.content_html:
Outdoor rock season has pretty much come to a close here in the heart of the ADK, so until accessible ice comes in, we’ll be moving indoors. Our meetup on Wednesday, November 12 will be graciously hosted by the Paul Smith’s Rock Gym. They’re extending their hours so that we can start climbing at 6pm! Thanks @psc.rok! See you there!

Google Maps link in bio.

items.content_html:
Come hang with other cool climbers on Wednesday at 5:45pm! Since the weather looks nasty, we’ll plan to climb at the Hi-Notch Gym at @vanhoevenberg ($7 for after-hours pass). But if the weather magically clears, we’ll try for one more outdoor climb at Sharp Bridge Campground. Keep an eye on our story! (Links in bio.)

Equipment support provided by @onwardguides, so bring your friends even if they don’t have their own gear.

items.content_html:
Wear your best (harness-compatible) costume to the Creature Wall on Wednesday for our Halloween-themed meetup! Hope to see you there!

Map and crag info is at the link in our bio. Gear support provided by @onwardguides.

(Pretend that image is of a crag, not an indoor wall 😅)

items.content_html: Thanks to everyone to came to @vanhoevenberg tonight! Great times! We’ll be at Creature Wall for next week’s costume climb.
items.content_text: Thanks to everyone to came to @vanhoevenberg tonight! Great times! We'll be at Creature Wall for next week's costume climb.

items.content_html:
UPDATE! Due to wet conditions, we will climb at Van Hoevenberg’s gym tonight. Don’t forget your $7 for their after-hours pass!

Sorry for the late notice, but our meetup plan for Oct. 22 is at the Chapel Pond Slab & Boulders — that’s right, choose your own adventure! If conditions are still wet (kinda likely tbh) we’ll head to our usual Plan B spot: @vanhoevenberg’s Hi-Notch Gym. Keep an eye on our story or WhatsApp community chat for updates. Hope to see you there, wherever there ends up being!

Extra gear — harness, helmet, shoes, crash pads — available from our supporter @onwardguides.

Links for maps/routes via @mountainproject in our bio.

items.content_html:
This Wednesday’s meetup will be at the Beer Walls! This crag has something for everyone, so bring your friends (they can borrow gear from @onwardguides). See you at 5:45pm — we usually climb till 9ish, so don’t forget your headlamp!

If you don’t see us in the parking lot, check the Seven Ounces wall and Live Free or Die walls first — there’s usually someone there! Link for map/info in bio.

items.content_html:
Forecast calls for more rain on Wednesday, followed by cloudy and chilly conditions. We’ll meet for after hours climbing at the Hi-Notch Gym at @vanhoevenberg, which also means you have the option of getting in a trail run with our friends at @adk_runclub! Run up the mountain, and finish with some laps in the gym!

See you at 5:45pm!

items.content_html:
Climbing and community, that’s what the club is for! Come get in some pitches at classic local crags, and make new friends (and climbing partners!) at the same time. Rental gear provided for free by our sponsor @onwardguides, so bring your friends, even if they’re new to climbing. And don’t forget your headlamp! 🔦

Keep an eye on our stories for last-minute changes if there’s inclement weather. We usually go to @vanhoevenberg’s indoor gym if it’s raining.

Come hang with us at Owl’s Head Mtn for some chill crack climbs in a gorgeous setting. Or if the rain hits, find us at @vanhoevenberg for the Hi-Notch Climbing Gym’s after-hours ($7).

You can borrow gear from @onwardguides if needed! Links to spots in our bio.

Come climb cracks with us at the Creature Wall on Sept. 17 at 5:45pm. Routes are generally moderate at this crag. Park near the Giant Mtn Ridge Trail. Directions, map, and info at the @mountainproject link in our bio.

Need gear? @onwardguides brings helmets, harnesses, and shoes for folks to use. (But they might be late this week.)

items.content_html: Great club night at Jewels & Gems! Thanks for climbing with us!

items.content_html:
Our meetup on #Sendtember 10th will be at the wonderful Jewels & Gems crag near Chapel Pond. It’s got it all: super short approach, face and crack climbs, lead and top rope-able, with routes from 5.6 on up. See you at 5:45pm. Don’t forget your headlamp for those after dark climbs!

Map, directions, and route info is available at the @mountainproject link in our bio. Free gear rentals courtesy of @onwardguides — get your buddy out with us!
items.content_text: Our meetup on #Sendtember 10th will be at the wonderful Jewels & Gems crag near Chapel Pond. It's got it all: super short approach, face and crack climbs, lead and top rope-able, with routes from 5.6 on up. See you at 5:45pm. Don't forget your headlamp for those after dark climbs! Map, directions, and route info is available at the @mountainproject link in our bio. Free gear rentals courtesy of @onwardguides — get your buddy out with us!

items.content_html:
Hope to see you out climbing with us this #Sendtember while the leaves be peaking! We meet up every Wednesday evening for climbing and camaraderie. We climb till dark (and sometimes after!), so bring your headlamp.

This month’s crags: 9/10 Jewels & Gems 9/17 Creature Wall 9/24 Owl’s Head

Free gear rentals are provided by our sponsor @onwardguides, so bring your friends even if they’re new to climbing! There are always opportunities to lead and top rope, and we try to pick out spots that have a variety of grades.

Keep an eye on our story for backup plans in case of rain, and please reach out with any questions!

items.content_html:
Sorry for the late post, but our meetup tonight will be at Sunshine City of Spanky’s Area, south of Keene Valley. It’s a fun little sport/trad mixed area, so if you’re been waiting for bolts, tonight’s your night! See you at 5:45pm. We climb past dark, so bring your headlamp!!

Extra shoes/harnesses/helmets will be available courtesy of @onwardguides, so bring a friend!

Directions and more crag info is at the Mountain Project link in our bio.

Extra shoes/harnesses/helmets will be available courtesy of @onwardguides, so bring a friend! Directions and more crag info is at the Mountain Project link in our bio.

items.content_html: Baker Mountain gloriousness. Thanks to everyone who came out to climb!
items.content_text: Baker Mountain gloriousness. Thanks to everyone who came out to climb!

items.content_html:
See you for tomorrow’s meetup at Baker Mountain crag in Saranac Lake. We’ll meet up at 5:45p along the road next to Moody Pond (be mindful of parking!) and then do the 15 min hike up to the crag. Approach description is on Mountain Project (link in bio). Don’t forget your headlamps!

Baker is a beginner-friendly crag with routes starting at 5.4, with harder test pieces as well. And the bolted TR anchor is top-accessible if you don’t want to lead!

Gear available for free to those in need, courtesy of @onwardguides.

See you on Wednesday for our weekly meetup, this time at Poke-o-Moonshine! We’ll in the main lot by the Ranger Trail at 5:45pm.

If you or a friend needs to borrow gear, @onwardguides will have helmet/shoes/harness available. Please DM them ahead of time!

Link for directions and crag info in bio.

items.content_html:
Tonight’s meet up is planned for the Owl’s Head crag in Cascade Pass! It’s a fun little crag with spectacular views and easy to moderate routes.

The forecast calls for rain at 6pm though just as we’re getting started, so if that happens we’ll head to @vanhoevenberg’s indoor Hi-Notch gym for after-hours climbing ($7, 5-8pm).

Links for more info in bio. Hope to see you there!

items.content_html:
Come check out some great crags with great friends each Wednesday night (5:45pm) in August! (Check our stories for last-minute updates if weather is funky.)

Aug 6 Pitchoff Aug 13 Owls Head Aug 20 Poke-O-Moonshine Aug 27 Baker Mtn

Bring a buddy and borrow gear from @onwardguides. Hope to see you there!

items.content_html:
See you tomorrow night, July 30, for our weekly meet up! We’re climbing at the standout Pitchoff Chimney Cliff by Cascade Lakes. There’s something for everyone, whether is warming up on the Practice Wall, multi-pitching on one of the many routes that top out the cliff, or throwing yourself at the classic single pitch Roaches on the Wall (5.10).

We’ll meet at the pull-off across the street, but you’ll definitely see us on the cliff if you’re a little late. Directions and crag info at the link in our bio. Don’t forget your water and headlamp!

Harness/helmet/shoes provided courtesy of @onwardguides for those in need. Bring a friend!

items.content_html:
UPDATE! Some folks are heading to the Beer Walls at 5pm instead to be near water and beat the heat. Can’t guarantee anyone will be at Poke-O!

This week’s meetup (tonight) is at the incomparable Poke-O-Moonshine! Meet at the main lot at 5:45pm. (If you’re interested in getting there early to climb more, you might find a partner in our WhatsApp community chat. Link bio.) Due to a scheduling conflict, there may not be extra equipment available tonight from @onwardguides.

Link to driving directions and crag information in bio.

📸: @baker_media24

See you at tonight’s meetup at Deadwater Cliff. If it rains, as it often seems to do when we plan a Deadwater day, we’ll hit up @vanhoevenberg’s after-hours gym ($7). Links in bio!

Gear available for free from @onwardguides if you need it!

items.content_html: July schedule just dropped! Hope to see you and your friends out for some climbing and community. All are welcome. Keep an eye on our posts/stories for the latest in case of changes. 5:45pm every Wednesday. We climb till dark (and sometimes after).

items.content_html: Great success at Tilman’s Arete!
items.content_text: Great success at Tilman's Arete!

items.content_html:
To make the most of our hottest week of the summer so far (and the solstice! ☀️), we’re moving our meetup from Deadwater to Chapel Pond TOMORROW! We’ll have ropes going at Tilman’s Arete, Shipton’s Arete, and The Aquarium (5.3 and up). Maybe some parties going up the Slab or checking out the bouldering? And easy access to the pond to take a dip in-between climbs! Bring your usual stuff, plus a swim suit and towel, and let’s beat the heat! 🥵🏊💦

See you at 5:45pm (we’ve been staying out till 10pm or so)! Link to crag info and driving directions in bio.

If you or your friend needs to borrow gear, @onwardguides has you covered! Just message them with a heads up!

items.content_html:
Our climber meetup for Wednesday, June 18 will be at the classic Jewels & Gems crag (info and directions at link in bio). Wicked easy approach, and climbs range from 5.6-5.11. All are welcome!

As usual, if you need to borrow a helmet, harness, or shoes, our friends at @onwardguides has you covered. Just DM them ahead of time so they know what to expect.

items.content_html:
Hope to see you on Wednesday night for our weekly climber meet-up. KPSW is a great place for beginners, so if you’ve been holding out, now’s your time. Lots of room at the base for hanging out, too. Known for its excellent top roping, there are some great lead routes at KPSW too! Should be something for everyone. Link for info and driving directions in bio.

Need gear? @onwardguides supports the club by making harness/helmet/shoes available for FREE to anyone who needs them. (Try to get there by 5:45pm to pick out what you need at the trailhead.) Check out their page and website for guided trips and cool ADK & climber-inspired merch.

items.content_html:
For your planning pleasure, here’s our plan for our Wednesday meet-ups this month! Plans could change, so keep an eye on our page/stories for the latest. We have a WhatsApp group chat too! Link in bio.

Our meet-ups are friendly, fun, and great for climbers of all skill levels! You don’t even need all your own gear. Just message @onwardguides to borrow helmet/harness/shoes for free! Hope to see you (and your buddy) there!

@adirondackclimberscoalition #lifeisbetterwhenclimbing

Mountain Project link (with driving directions and route info) in bio.

Wednesday May 7th’s Climb Club meetup will be at Deadwater Cliff! But if we get rained out (and let’s be real, the forecast is looking pretty wet) we’ll head to @vanhoevenberg instead. So bring your $7 for the after-hours pass just in case!

See you at 5:45pm!

Here’s our plan for the month of May! Our meet ups are beginner-friendly, inclusive, and fun! Bring a buddy and contact @onwardguides if you need to borrow gear for free!

May 7: Deadwater May 14: Beer Walls May 21: McKenzie Pond Boulders May 28: Sunshine City

Keep an eye on our page for last-minute updates or changes.

May 7: Deadwater May 14: Beer Walls May 21: McKenzie Pond Boulders May 28: Sunshine City Keep an eye on our page for last-minute updates or changes.

items.content_html: Great gathering of club climbers!
items.content_text: Great gathering of club climbers!

items.content_html:
You’re invited to come climb with the club tomorrow, WEDNESDAY April 30. Our meetups are open to all skills levels — both leading and top roping. We’ll meet at the trailhead at 5:45pm and start hiking up no later than 6pm. Just head up the trail if you’re late!

Parking is limited at the trailhead (and only open to the public on weekdays btw), so consider carpooling with your buddy. We can help coordinate if you DM us.

Bring along your climbing gear, a HEADLAMP, and a post-climb beverage. Please message @onwardguides if you need to borrow a harness, helmet, shoes or other gear for the evening.

See you there! 🤘
items.content_text: You're invited to come climb with the club tomorrow, WEDNESDAY April 30. Our meetups are open to all skills levels — both leading and top roping. We'll meet at the trailhead at 5:45pm and start hiking up no later than 6pm. Just head up the trail if you're late! Parking is limited at the trailhead (and only open to the public on weekdays btw), so consider carpooling with your buddy. We can help coordinate if you DM us. Bring along your climbing gear, a HEADLAMP, and a post-climb beverage. Please message @onwardguides if you need to borrow a harness, helmet, shoes or other gear for the evening. See you there! 🤘

items.content_html: Our meetup last night at Baker Mountain was a blast!
items.content_text: Our meetup last night at Baker Mountain was a blast!

items.content_html:
Now held on WEDNESDAYS, this week’s climb club meetup will be held at the Baker Mountain crag in Saranac Lake. Parking is limited, so please carpool and heed parking regulations around Moody Pond. The approach is ~15 minutes and often muddy, so wear shoes you don’t mind getting wet and dirty. We’ll be able to put up ropes on routes ranging from 5.4 to 5.11.

Approach info in Mountain Project link in bio. We’ll try to have someone at the trailhead at 5:45p to show the way for newcomers. Don’t forget your headlamp and after-climb beverage!

Don’t have your own gear? DM our friends at @onwardguides ahead of time to borrow some for the night.

items.content_html: Had a great time with the crew at @vanhoevenberg tonight! Love the encouraging energy everyone brings. Hope to be back outside soon!

items.content_html: With inches of fresh snow on the ground and low temps tomorrow, looks like we’re headed back to @vanhoevenberg for our Thursday meetup! The gym was recently reset for their climbing comp, so lots of new problems and routes to try! See you there from 5:45-8pm. Don’t forget $7 for your after-hours pass.

items.content_html: Bring your puffy, your pad, and your pal to the McKenzie Pond Boulders on Thurs, April 10 for this week’s club meetup! We’ll brave the cold and go pull on some real rock for the first time this season. (Maybe bring a hand warmer for your chalk bag too, and a drink for afterwards!) Map link in bio.

Thursday, March 27: Mt. Van Hoevenberg Climbing Gym

Hopefully warm weather will return soon to get us outside, but we’ll climb at the @vanhoevenberg gym this week! Bring your climbing gear (or borrow some from @onwardguides), $7 for the after-hours pass, a friend, and beverage for afterward. See you there!
